final:
module right_shifter_signed(
    input               clk         ,
    input               rst_n       ,
    input       [7:0]   data_in     ,
    input       [2:0]   shift_amount,

    output  reg [7:0]   data_out
);

    // Shift operation with sign extension
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (!rst_n) begin
            data_out <= 0;
        end else begin
            data_out <= $signed(data_in) >>> shift_amount;
        end
    end

endmodule
